description: Create an automated outbreak detection dashboard in Epi Info 7 to flag potential disease outbreaks in daily COVID-19 case counts. Using the dataset at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Surveillance\cook_county_daily.csv, configure an aberration detection analysis with the 'date' field, 'cases' field, 'C2' (Cumulative Sum) method, and a 7-day lag time. Save the dashboard canvas to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Surveillance\DailyMonitoring.canvas.
